title: Evangelion 2.22 Script (Translation)
wikitext:
{{construction}}

This is the translated script from the Japanese DVD/BD release of Evangelion 2.22. 

{| border="1" style="background-color:white; text-align: left"
! cut
! notes
! dialogue
! translation
|-
|
|
|
|
|-
|
|
|
|
|-
|
|
|
|
|-
|☆ ○Tel Op "Preview"
|
|
|
|-
|Cut-1 
|A lake made out of the Geofront. On the lake's surface, a spear is struck through Eva-01. Track Up. The dark pillars are lined up behind.
|"Rei and Shinji taken into"
|
|-
|Cut-2 
|Close UP on the eyes glowing faintly. 
|"the frozen Eva-01."
|
|-
|Cut-3
|○Tel Op 
|(Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Eva-01 Restricted Area. No Entry Beyond This Point.")
|
|-
|Cut-4
|Abandoned and changed city. A group of buildings, similar to a mass tombstone. Track Back. Telephone poles, among other things, have collapsed. 
|"The fortified city abandoned." 
|-
|Cut-5
|○Tel Op
|(Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Tokyo III. Near Third Impact. Ground Zero.")
|
|-
|Cut-6
|V-22 Osprey descending on an aircraft carrier within an anchorage.
|"Nerv officials are imprisoned." 
|
|-
|''Cut-7: (Mentioned in Storyboards, but NOT in this final script!)'' 
|''Closeup of a register of names posted on a door with a chain across the front.'' 
|
|
|-
|Cut-8
|○Tel Op 
|(Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Near Third Impact Eyewitness Debriefing In Progress. No Entry Without Authority.")
|
|-
|Cut-9
|Mark.06 descending to Dogma. Track Back.
|"Dropped into Dogma"
|
|-
|Cut-10 
|UP on that. (The face section.) 
|"is Eva-06." 
|
|-
|Cut-11 
|○Tel Op 
|(Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Lilith Preservation Site. Access Strictly Restricted.")
|
|-
|Cut-12
|Eva-08 (floating). There's something like an angel's halo below it. Track Back. 
|"The quickening Eva-08 and"
|
|-
|Cut-13
|UP on that. The light of the 3 eyes come on. Track Back. (Slightly.) 
|"its pilot." 
|
|-
|Cut-14
|○Tel Op
|(Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Eva-08 Construction Area. No Unauthorized Entry Allowed.")
|
|-
|Cut-15 
|Kaworu's face, side profile, UP. 
|"Finally assembled"
|
|-
|Cut-16
|In front of Kaworu are four people's extended shadows. Track Back. 
|"are the children plotted by fate." 
|
|-
|Cut-17
|○Tel Op 
|(Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Seele Children's Assembly In Session. Do Not Enter.") 
|
|-
|Cut-18
|UP on Misato's head. She's pulling on something to elevate it.
|"In the end,"
|
|-
|Cut-19
|Ready with a gun, Kaji frantically shouting.
|"for those people"
|
|-
|Cut-20
|Gendo and Fuyutsuki.
|"who wish to live,"
|
|-
|Cut-21
|Rei waist-shot.
|"where will"
|
|-
|Cut-22
|UP on Mari. As she removes her glasses, she glares in this direction.
|"the story lead to?"
|
|-
|Cut-22B
|○Tel Op
|(Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Private Conference Between Mari Makinami Illustrious & ________________. Do Not Enter.")
|
|-
|Cut-23
|Asuka's restriction support pillar has become empty. Light has also vanished.
|"Next Time"
|
|-
|Cut-24
|Asuka raises her face.
|"Evangelion New Theatrical Edition"
|
|-
|☆
|○Tel Op "Next Time Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: Q" 
|"Q. Next time I'll also give you service, service~" 
|
|-
|}

[[Category:Resources (Placeholders)]]
html:
"We've seen it. The proof of its construction was very useful."
This article or section is under construction, and needs to be further expanded.
Please provide input on the talk page, or help build this page.

This is the translated script from the Japanese DVD/BD release of Evangelion 2.22.

cut notes dialogue translation
☆ ○Tel Op "Preview"
Cut-1 A lake made out of the Geofront. On the lake's surface, a spear is struck through Eva-01. Track Up. The dark pillars are lined up behind. "Rei and Shinji taken into"
Cut-2 Close UP on the eyes glowing faintly. "the frozen Eva-01."
Cut-3 ○Tel Op (Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Eva-01 Restricted Area. No Entry Beyond This Point.")
Cut-4 Abandoned and changed city. A group of buildings, similar to a mass tombstone. Track Back. Telephone poles, among other things, have collapsed. "The fortified city abandoned."
Cut-5 ○Tel Op (Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Tokyo III. Near Third Impact. Ground Zero.")
Cut-6 V-22 Osprey descending on an aircraft carrier within an anchorage. "Nerv officials are imprisoned."
Cut-7: (Mentioned in Storyboards, but NOT in this final script!) Closeup of a register of names posted on a door with a chain across the front.
Cut-8 ○Tel Op (Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Near Third Impact Eyewitness Debriefing In Progress. No Entry Without Authority.")
Cut-9 Mark.06 descending to Dogma. Track Back. "Dropped into Dogma"
Cut-10 UP on that. (The face section.) "is Eva-06."
Cut-11 ○Tel Op (Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Lilith Preservation Site. Access Strictly Restricted.")
Cut-12 Eva-08 (floating). There's something like an angel's halo below it. Track Back. "The quickening Eva-08 and"
Cut-13 UP on that. The light of the 3 eyes come on. Track Back. (Slightly.) "its pilot."
Cut-14 ○Tel Op (Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Eva-08 Construction Area. No Unauthorized Entry Allowed.")
Cut-15 Kaworu's face, side profile, UP. "Finally assembled"
Cut-16 In front of Kaworu are four people's extended shadows. Track Back. "are the children plotted by fate."
Cut-17 ○Tel Op (Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Seele Children's Assembly In Session. Do Not Enter.")
Cut-18 UP on Misato's head. She's pulling on something to elevate it. "In the end,"
Cut-19 Ready with a gun, Kaji frantically shouting. "for those people"
Cut-20 Gendo and Fuyutsuki. "who wish to live,"
Cut-21 Rei waist-shot. "where will"
Cut-22 UP on Mari. As she removes her glasses, she glares in this direction. "the story lead to?"
Cut-22B ○Tel Op (Tel Op reads "KEEP OUT. Private Conference Between Mari Makinami Illustrious & ________________. Do Not Enter.")
Cut-23 Asuka's restriction support pillar has become empty. Light has also vanished. "Next Time"
Cut-24 Asuka raises her face. "Evangelion New Theatrical Edition"
☆ ○Tel Op "Next Time Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: Q" "Q. Next time I'll also give you service, service~"
summary: This is the translated script from the Japanese DVD/BD release of Evangelion 2.22.
